findings.description: Vocabulary scan: 0 unsafe words in eval_slicer.py. Approved
artifact-family-health-report.schema.json enforces strict validation. All required fields present. Test validates schema conformance
Predicate evaluation in _evaluate_predicate() uses restricted namespace. Tested with injection attempts. No bypass possible
Test suite: 11 tests covering slice registration, filtering, critical blocking, error cases, pass rate calculation. All pass
Slice registries stored with immutable=True. Health reports not marked immutable (read-only for slicing purposes)

approval_comment: Implementation matches design. Vocabulary safe. Schema validation strict. Predicate evaluation safe. All tests pass. Approved for commit.
